title: Get Records
agent_notes: Official Zoho CRM V8 Records API for retrieving records by module or record ID.

title: Search Records
agent_notes: Official Zoho CRM V8 Search Records API for module-specific CRM record lookup.

title: Insert Records
agent_notes: Official Zoho CRM V8 Insert Records API, including module mandatory field notes.

title: Update Records
agent_notes: Official Zoho CRM V8 Update Records API.

title: Get Related Records
agent_notes: Official Zoho CRM V8 Related Records API for associated records such as deals and contacts.
